# anthropic_effective_spend_limits (Data Source)

Lists each member's effective spend limit and period-to-date spend. Source scope shows where the limit came from (user override, seat_tier, rbac_group, organization_service, organization).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Every member's effective spend limit + period-to-date spend.
data "anthropic_effective_spend_limits" "monthly" {
  period = ["monthly"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `period` (List of String)
- `user_ids` (List of String)

### Read-Only

- `summaries` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--summaries))

<a id="nestedatt--summaries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `summaries`

Read-Only:

- `amount` (String)
- `currency` (String)
- `period` (String)
- `period_to_date_spend` (String)
- `source_scope_type` (String) Scope where this limit was inherited from.
- `user_deleted` (Boolean)
- `user_email` (String)
- `user_id` (String)
- `user_name` (String)
